title: cuphea heterophylla
intro: Cuphea heterophylla, also known as Mexican heather or false heather, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cuphea heterophylla include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
